The community lacks a good example of distributed inference in a K8s environment.
The community lacks examples of containerized environments combined with high-speed networks like RoCE.
K8s is the most popular open-source infrastructure platform, but it lacks best practices for integrati

sglang.title: [Feature] Apply Cublas Grouped Gemm kernel
sglang.author: Fridge003
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

#3323
Grouped Gemm kernel added in Cublas 12.5 is useful. It can be applied to MoE EP layer/Lora layer for acceleration.
Modifications

Add cublas_grouped_gemm in sgl-kernel library, and provides accuracy test/benchmark script.
Update document for this feature.

Environment:
Torch 2.5.1,

vllm.title: Run v1 benchmark and integrate with PyTorch OSS benchmark database
vllm.author: huydhn
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds an option to benchmark v1 locally by setting VLLM_USE_V1=1.  Because we don't have the hardware on OSS to run v1 benchmark for now, I plan to run this periodically first in some internal Meta devgpus that I have at hand (A100/H100/MI300x).
As there is no Buildkite in internal Meta hardw

vllm.title: [MISC] tiny fixes
vllm.author: MengqingCao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
use device_name instead of dispatch_key in log print
fix typo

vllm.title: [VLM] Check required fields before initializing field config in `DictEmbeddingItems`
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Since field config can depend on some required fields, this PR runs the required fields check first to provide a more informative error message.

vllm.title: [Model] Support Mamba2 (Codestral Mamba)
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add support for Mamba2.
Todo:

 Integration tests
 Support Chunked Prefill
 Incorporate mamba_chunk_scan_combined kernel to avoid the dependency on mamba_ssm
 Fix tensor parallelism
 Try to refactor the code for Mamba2's mixer layer to look more like Mamba's

Closes #6479

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix VLLM_USE_MODELSCOPE issue
vllm.author: r4ntix
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
When using VLLM_USE_MODELSCOPE, the huggingface_hub API will be used to get the model file list.
FIX #13382 (link existing issues this PR will resolve)

vllm.title: [V1] Get input tokens from scheduler
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR changes the scheduler and model runner so that the model runner gets the input token IDs from the scheduler. This change is especially useful when the token IDs are not generated by the model runner (e.g., non-last ranks in PP).

vllm.title: [V1][PP] Fix intermediate tensor values
vllm.author: comaniac
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
#13353 cached the intermediate tensors to make CUDA graph work. However, we forgot to copy the values of intermediate tensors to the cached tensors. This PR fixes it.
With this PR and #13339, I've verified that the PP is working with the correct outputs in a single node.
cc @WoosukKwon @ruisearch42

vllm.title: [V1][Spec decode] Move drafter to model runner
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR moves the speculative decoding drafter, from the engine core to the model runner. At the end of each step, taking the large model’s outputs or hidden states, the spec decoding drafter generates extra "unverified" tokens. Those extra tokens are scheduled and verified in the next step, and in

vllm.title: [Bugfix][CI][V1] Work around V1 + CUDA Graph + torch._scaled_mm fallback issue
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR works around an issue where vLLM V1, using Ada Lovelace GPUs, and when building vLLM with CUDA < 12.4, FP8 models with per-channel and/or per-tensor quantization will produce garbage output.
Closes #13212
AFAICT, there is some issue with the way we are setting up TORCH_DEVICE_IDENTITY
Altern

vllm.title: [Misc] Remove dangling references to `SamplingType.BEAM`
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
SamplingType.BEAM was removed from vllm/sampling_params.py in #9105
This PR removes two remaining references to SamplingType.BEAM and the dead code that cannot be reached with these references removed.
Closes #13355.

vllm.title: [Model] Enable quantization support for `transformers` backend
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add BNB support for transformers backend
 Update the available quantization in transformers backend docs.

vllm.title: [ROCm] fix get_device_name for rocm
vllm.author: divakar-amd
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Use amd-smi to get the device name for AMD GPUs.

This fixes the hard-coded "AMD" name introduced in #12790
Proper device name is required to distinguish triton's tuned configs from each other for AMD GPUs. e.g. MI300 vs MI325

Tested using:
VLLM_ENABLE_V1_MULTIPROCESSING=0 VLLM_USE_V1=1 python benc

vllm.title: [v1] fix parallel config rank
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
#12816 forgot to copy this line of code, and workers cannot get their rank correctly. that information is used in

vllm.title: [V1][PP] Fix & Pin Ray version in requirements-cuda.txt
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Pipeline parallelism in V1 requires ray[adag] instead of ray[default].
Also, because of the API changes in 2.42.0, we have to pin the version to 2.41.0 (or 2.40.0).
NOTE: Importantly, having ray[adag] will add CuPy (cu12) as a dependency. Since PP is not used for all models, we can consider keeping
